creator: c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
text:
New patch.

Also this port is listed as vuln to a exploit in 2007 which still gets
reported even if the version is set to latest. But that is out of my
league.  Not sure how to fix except renaming this ports version to
something higher than 2007*

But since this is -devel I thought the nightly snapshot is appropriate

-- 

Chris Petrik
Consulting: http://www.officialunix.com
BSD Site: http://www.bsdjunk.com
FreeBSD ports contributor
Since 18-July-2009
